reasons: primary parser for untrusted CLI input
accepts derivation-default fields and secret-egress flags
translates parsed CLI into security-sensitive requests
maps repeated --context pairs into a BTreeMap
no model-level invariant enforcement for derivation defaults
mode/use expansion shapes allowed attack surface

identity creation and export policy enforcement live here
